title: Economic Assessment of Deploying Advanced Coal Power Technologies in the Chinese Context
summary: Zhao presents her and her colleagues' work on comparing a variety of advanced coal power technologies for China on technical, environmental, and cost bases.
body: Presentation at ETIP Seminar Series The latest from Belfer See more Zhao presents her and her colleagues' work on comparing a variety of advanced coal power technologies for China on technical, environmental, and cost bases.
